channel.title: Frontion - Geopolitical News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israeli minister announces military takeover of Hebron administration
item.description: Israeli Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich says Israel has transferred authority over Hebron to the army, a significant escalation in West Bank control that could further complicate regional peace efforts.

item.title: 🇧🇷 Brazilian court convicts Eduardo Bolsonaro for seeking US interference in domestic affairs
item.description: A Brazilian court found Eduardo Bolsonaro guilty of attempting to enlist US government interference in Brazil, a case tied to broader tensions between Brasilia and Washington over tariffs and judicial sanctions.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Damaged Kyiv monastery from Russian strike will take two years to restore
item.description: Ukrainian officials say the nearly 1,000-year-old monastery in Kyiv, damaged by what Ukraine described as a deliberate Russian strike, requires around two years of restoration work.

item.title: 🇫🇷 Anti-capitalist protesters descend on G7 summit in France
item.description: Anti-capitalist demonstrations unfolded at the G7 summit in Evian-les-Bains as world leaders discussed global security, the Iran deal, and economic policy inside the heavily secured venue.

item.title: 🤖 G7 leaders discuss granting trusted partners access to cutting-edge US AI models
item.description: G7 leaders discussed a plan to grant select trusted partners access to advanced AI models from US firms such as Anthropic, three diplomatic sources said, potentially opening a path around restrictions on non-American use of the technology.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israeli drone strikes kill at least 4 in southern Lebanon
item.description: Israeli drone strikes targeted three vehicles in southern Lebanon, killing at least four people and wounding others, Lebanons National News Agency reported. The strikes come amid ongoing tensions even as the US-Iran peace deal raises hopes for regional de-escalation.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump-backed candidate loses Georgia governor runoff in upset
item.description: Georgia Republican voters rejected President Trumps preferred nominee for the competitive open governor race, delivering a rare primary endorsement defeat. Rep. Mike Collins won the Republican Senate runoff and will face Sen. Jon Ossoff in a closely watched matchup.

item.title: 🏛️ White House talking points on Iran deal dont match reality, AP analysis finds
item.description: The White House proclaimed major victories in its Iran talking points, including Iran agreeing to never have a nuclear weapon and reopening the Strait of Hormuz. But the AP found several claims go against realities on the ground, especially regarding what Israel has agreed to in Lebanon. The MOU remains a closely guarded secret even among Republican allies.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanon prepares new round of talks with Israel as president and PM coordinate strategy
item.description: Lebanese leaders discussed preparations for a new round of negotiations with Israel next week, as the US-Iran deal raises prospects for broader regional de-escalation and Israel-Hezbollah tensions ease.

item.title: 🇮🇶 Trump to host Iraqi Prime Minister at White House in mid-July
item.description: US President Trump will host Iraqi PM Ali al-Zaidi at the White House next month, as Washington reshapes Middle East alliances following the Iran peace deal.

item.title: 🇨🇦 Canada Carney raises China EV tariffs with Trump at G7, announces new Russia sanctions
item.description: Canadian PM Mark Carney held a short but intense discussion with Trump on China EV trade at the G7 summit, while also announcing fresh sanctions against Russia over the Ukraine war.

item.title: 🇨🇳 US holds off blacklisting China's DeepSeek and 100+ flagged firms to avoid escalating Beijing tensions
item.description: The Trump administration has delayed adding DeepSeek, CXMT, and over 100 Chinese companies flagged as national security risks to the trade blacklist, seeking to avoid further escalation with Beijing amid fragile diplomatic ties.

item.title: 🇪🇺 European leaders test Iran deal risks at G7, urge rethink on Ukraine strategy
item.description: European allies at the G7 summit raised concerns about the US-Iran interim deal's implications while pushing Trump to reconsider his approach to Ukraine, as the summit revealed persistent transatlantic divisions.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump says Ukraine war has no impact on US as G7 reveals persistent ally divisions
item.description: President Trump downplayed the Ukraine war's significance for the US at the G7 summit, even as allied leaders pushed for stronger collective action and the mood around the Iran deal lightened the overall agenda.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump vows to release text of Iran agreement within days as key questions remain unanswered
item.description: At the G7 summit, Trump promised to publish the full text of the US-Iran interim deal soon, but critical details about enforcement, timelines, and Israel's Lebanon withdrawal demands remain unresolved.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil prices fall 5% to 3-month low on Strait of Hormuz reopening hopes
item.description: Crude prices dropped sharply for a second straight session as details of the US-Iran interim deal emerged, including an agreement to allow Iran to sell oil and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelenskiy says G7 agreed Russia is not winning, discussed more sanctions
item.description: Ukrainian President Zelenskiy said G7 leaders agreed that Russia is not winning the war in Ukraine and discussed additional sanctions to bring Moscow to the negotiating table.

item.title: 💰 Gold holds gains as US and Iran prepare to sign interim peace deal
item.description: Gold prices held steady as markets assessed the implications of the US-Iran interim peace deal, which could ease global inflationary pressures and reshape energy markets.

item.title: ⚔️ British couple recount Russian warship firing warning shots near their boat
item.description: A retired British couple described warning shots fired near their vessel by a Russian warship in international waters, highlighting ongoing maritime tensions between Russia and Western civilians.

item.title: 🇦🇺🇮🇱 Australia relaxes Middle East travel warnings after US-Iran interim deal
item.description: Australia lowered travel advisories for Bahrain, Israel, Kuwait, Qatar, and the UAE following the US-Iran interim peace agreement, though it warned the security situation could still deteriorate rapidly with little warning.

item.title: 🛢️🇮🇷 US-Iran deal permits oil sales, includes access to billion private fund
item.description: Details of the US-Iran interim agreement reveal Tehran will be allowed to sell oil upon signing and gain access to a billion private fund. Trump also intensified criticism of Netanyahu over the Lebanon campaign.

item.title: 🇧🇷🇨🇳 Latin America and Europe are bystanders in the US-China AI race, says Lula adviser
item.description: Brazilian president Lula's top adviser Celso Amorim told a Rio conference that the Global South must respond through BRICS, framing rare earths and data sovereignty as strategic priorities in the emerging AI contest.

item.title: 💰 The Iran War Permanently Altered the Global Economy
item.description: The New York Times analyzes how the US-Iran war has fundamentally reshaped global trade patterns and oil markets, arguing that even with a peace deal, the economic order is unlikely to revert to its pre-war state.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanon Suffers Deadliest Spillover of the Regional War as Israel-Hezbollah Conflict Takes Heavy Toll
item.description: A Reuters factbox details the devastating costs to Lebanon from the latest Israel-Hezbollah war — the deadliest spillover of the regional conflict triggered by US-Israeli strikes on Iran more than three months ago.

item.title: 🛢️ Iran War — Energy Shock or Geopolitical Turning Point?
item.description: Reuters commentary examines whether the Iran war will be remembered as a temporary energy shock or a lasting watershed moment for global crude oil and LNG markets, as a US-Iran peace deal promises to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
